summary: Goodwill bounty #49: continued verifiable contribution to runx + Frantic ecosystem — published agency-health skill (registry + PR #290), purchase-approval skill (PR #301), and delivered Frantic #106.

observations.summary: agency-health skill published to the live runx registry (runx.ai/x/mamonisme/agency-health) and upstreamed via PR #290; purchase-approval skill via PR #301; Frantic #106 delivered with a post-publish dogfood receipt.
observations.audience: developers evaluating runx for agency health/ops automation
observations.why_allowed: a public GitHub repo + hosted registry listing are the canonical public adoption surfaces for a runx skill; no private context required, so this venue is allowed for the project mention
